goal: 修复 FEAT-047 代码审查 8 个问题(重试1): ERROR×2 fs.mkdirSync/appendFileSync 加 try-catch + WARN×3 IPC白名单/清理日志/冗余双写 + INFO×3 返回类型/eslint/LogLevel

coverage_checklist.mkdir_trycatch: assert: fs.mkdirSync 失败时 console.error 输出不崩溃
coverage_checklist.append_trycatch: assert: fs.appendFileSync 失败时 console.error 输出不崩溃
coverage_checklist.cleanup_log: assert: cleanup 失败时 catch 输出错误信息
coverage_checklist.ipc_whitelist: assert: log:write IPC 校验 level 白名单
coverage_checklist.console_dedup: assert: Logger 初始化后不冗余双写
coverage_checklist.level_type: assert: transport + logToFile level 为 LogLevel
coverage_checklist.all_pass: assert: typecheck + lint + test 全过
